Authors and Citation

Authors

  • JoonHo Lee. Author, maintainer, copyright holder.

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Lee, J.; Sui, D. (2025). Fully Bayesian Inference for Meta-Analytic Deconvolution Using Efron's Log-Spline Prior. Mathematics, 13(16), 2639. doi:10.3390/math13162639
